meaning: n.閭ｭ閼り勠(逕ｱ閭ｭ閼り勠蛻ｶ謌千噪)豢狗ｺ｢
examples: Cochineal insects are used widely in making food, cosmetic and medicine.
Carmine produced from cochineal has been used widely in food, cosmetics and pharmaceutics industry.
Carmine can also be identified on food labels as Crimson Lake, Cochineal, Natural Red 4, C.I. 75470 or E120.
For rosy cheeks, alkanet and cochineal were used as the basis for rouge.
Many dyes in jelly beans are derived from natural sources, such as turmeric, annatto, caramel, and (see above) cochineal.
